text:
Sorry all, I suspect my spam filter must have eaten the original: I'll =
have it taken out and given a stern talking-to.  I approve this =
enhancement wholeheartedly.  Indeed, if he's keen, I'm happy to pass my =
maintainers' hat on to Jimmy, as I don't have the time right now.

Cheers,

--=20
Andrew
